decisions.briefing: Markets were flat today — NASDAQ unchanged, S&P 500 up just 0.2% — a textbook neutral session with no catalyst to justify new entries. Per our strategy, we do not force buys on neutral days just to deploy the $677 in cash; we hold and wait for the next genuine risk-on signal. All 6 existing positions are held and managed by their automatic stop-loss and profit-target rules.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted sideways on July 10 as investors took a breather following recent gains, with the S&P 500 adding a token 0.2% and the NASDAQ finishing flat. The lack of major economic data releases or corporate catalysts left traders on the sidelines, resulting in subdued volume and tight intraday ranges. The session reflected a market in consolidation mode, neither willing to push higher nor giving back prior gains.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股於7月10日呈現橫盤整理格局，標普500指數小升0.2%，納斯達克指數則收平，市場在近期漲勢後進入休整。當日缺乏重要經濟數據或企業催化劑，機構資金普遍觀望，成交量溫和，盤中波幅收窄。整體走勢反映市場正處於消化階段，既無動力向上突破，亦未見明顯獲利回吐。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A 'risk-off' stance means choosing not to open new positions when market conditions lack clear upside momentum. On neutral days — like today — deploying cash into new stocks creates exposure without sufficient reward, since a flat market offers no wind at your back. Disciplined investors preserve dry powder for genuine risk-on setups (e.g., NASDAQ +2%+) where the odds of a profitable entry are meaningfully higher.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「避險模式」（Risk-Off）是指在市況缺乏明確上升動力時，選擇不開設新倉位的策略。在今天這類橫盤交易日，貿然入市只會增加持倉風險，卻換不到相應回報，因為平淡的市場走勢無法為新倉提供助力。有紀律的投資者會保留現金，等待真正的入市訊號（如納斯達克單日升幅達2%以上），在勝算更高的時機才部署資金。
